name: Information
description: Possessing the prerequisite concepts/terminology and background knowledge required to understand the current content.
coreQuestion: Do I know the necessary concepts and information?

name: Reasoning
description: Understanding the logical relationships that connect information into coherent explanations.
coreQuestion: Do I understand why the concepts are connected this way?

name: Construction
description: Organizing and integrating understanding into a stable mental model that can be reused and transferred.
coreQuestion: Can I organize and apply this understanding beyond the current example?
